Scarab Ring  
 


Slot: FINGER
AC: 2
SV FIRE: +2 SV DISEASE: +2 SV COLD: +2 SV MAGIC: +2 SV POISON: +2
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Slot: FINGER
AC: 2
SV FIRE: +2 SV DISEASE: +2 SV COLD: +2 SV MAGIC: +2 SV POISON: +2

Rarity: Rare

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

North Ro
NPC Name
Rahotep
The Fabled Rahotep


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
North Ro


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

Post Comment
wait another EQ year
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2002 at 10:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758616577
1 post
Was wandering the zone with my 21 ranger and saw em on track. (Conned blue to me) found him near tower? near the middle of the zone he dropped the ring:) TP server
▲ Page top
He Can Be tracked
QuoteReply
# Nov 23 2001 at 2:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250621082
21 posts
Was running through when i heard some ooc chatter about Rhaotep. I hit track and Bam Rhaotep. Dead mummy got ring defaulted it to my traveling partner since he had told me earlier in teh week that he wanted to kill the mummy.
▲ Page top
Owner of the Scarab Ring
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2001 at 5:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361185481
9 posts
Last night on Thoulus Paulus server, my lvl 14 Human Ranger and a lvl 14 Wood Elf Druid took Rahotep down. He dropped the ring. I lost the roll and still ended up with the ring. That's what happens when u play with nice people. Rahotep conned yellow to me at 14 so i think he was lvl 15 not 16.Still looking for the sceptre though.


Raniky Rising LVL 36 Iskar Shaman Tallon Zek
Kordelwalker Texasranger LVL 14 Human Ranger
Novaa LVL 14 Wood Elf Druid (My buddy)
▲ Page top
I GOT THE RING!
QuoteReply
# Aug 15 2001 at 5:17 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591762126664
5 posts
I decided to camp this guy after reading up a lot on this ring, the sceptre of rahotep, and rahotep himself. From the information that I gathered nobody was really sure when and where this guy would spawn or is it was a trigger spawn. So, what I did is sat close to the mid derv camp and sent the shout "if anyone sees rahotep please let me know....will pay!" and what do you know. 20min after sending this message and waiting I finally got a shout from someone saying that they saw it. Now, he spawned close to the mtn derv camp and around 7am game time. I ran just as fast as I could and finally saw him. Also, someone had mentioned in other post's that people couldn't track him and I can vouch for that. I'm a ranger and didn't pick him up. I con'ed him immediately and he was blue and I'm a lvl 17. I didn't take my time and started to take him out. We were neck to neck with health. Luckly I have a whip that prock's life tap. My luck struck and I got some health back and he went down. I got the scarab ring, jasper, and rune of proximity. I plan to camp the guy again and try to get the sceptre out of him. Hope this helps all of you...GOOD LUCK!

Yeros (Crossroads of Honor) Innoruuk Server
▲ Page top
Scarab Scared
QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2001 at 7:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250014088
8 posts
With a group of 10-14's and had one person scaraed we could not take him. I was grouped with a a bunch of kids who would "Hog Loot". I'm a cleric and I healed them for three hours and everytime I tried to get a loot, the where already on their knees before the dead hit the ground. Well, we killed him and I was sure to be on my knees and got the loot. Great ring for a Cleric.

By the way, I tried explaining to these guys that not being nice to you cleric is a bad thing. As you progress in Ever Quest, you rely on your healers. They would not listen. As a matter of fact, two of the agroed a Rec Con mob and brought him to me. In the middle of heals, I hit the Derv with Furor and these guys watch me die. They both had full health and had easily taken this guy 30 times before.

You know who you are, and you better be careful next time you group with someone.
▲ Page top
RE: Scarab Scared
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2001 at 8:10 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249395162
97 posts
i know the feeling but i'm a paladin. i have rangers and warriors out looting me when i out damage them which is really sad, but me and the cleric that was in my group decided to show them what its like not to get healed and take a **** load of damage....they died in less then 5 mins while me and the cleric sat back and watched (than we roasted the mobs to nothing in a few seconds) so peeps listen to me and the lady don't loot hog and KEEP THE CLERIC ALIVE!
▲ Page top
Killed him twice so far
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2001 at 6:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762855371
2 posts
And had to run from him once. I tried to log off and get there with one of my tougher chars,but he was gone before I got back. Both times I got him, he dropped the ring.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 18 2001 at 7:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ok i still have this thing and i want to get rid of it so if any of u people wanna buy the ring send me a tell i am on around the same times but now i am usually in the queynos area but mostly in eruds crossing so please send me a tell
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 02 2001 at 10:48 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) It helps to give your name you anonymous freak.

First, he gave his name on his first post. Second, you're really bright for a level 60 "Chnanter". Is that a new class or something? I wonder if it's any good.

#REDACTED, Posted: May 16 2001 at 11:07 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ok i have this thing for sale on the xev server for 175pp thats less than the price shown if u want to buy it log onto eq and come to gfay i am usually on mon.-fri. from 3-5 and from 8-10 and also on sporatcially on the weekends plz i have had this thing for a while and no one wants so plz come and buy it off me
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 02 2001 at 10:47 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You're an idiot.
Rare!
QuoteReply
# May 14 2001 at 1:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758409305
View User Forum
28 posts
I tracked this mob to the ruined tower near the zone into NRo (in-game night) he conned BTM at 16, and was an easy kill. I dont know how often he spawns, but it is rare...so rare that I cant find anyone else who has killed him. and regarding price, I have no idea, as no one can remember ever seeing this ring for sale...great loot for a low lvl tho)

Root-Shoot-n-loot...you can sleep when your dead.
▲ Page top
Igahmus
QuoteReply
# May 07 2001 at 7:54 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
blah, i have no idea when this guys spawns, but i know what he looks like. he looks like a mummy and seems to be a wandering spawn. i had the luck of bumping into this guy after zoning in to nro from oasis. i found him near the south part of the zone in nro..somewhere in the middle of it between the shore and the cliffs.
▲ Page top
Spawn Rate
QuoteReply
# Apr 18 2001 at 11:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758498823
2 posts
I have been searching for awhile on the Tunare server for this guy. He does spawn, but no one knows exactly when. I've talked to people who have killed him and one said that he was a trigger spawn, and that he could be triggered by killing all the mummies you can. The other said he was a timed spawn and that he spawned once every EQ year, which I think is 3 weeks. Anyway, I just wanted to share that since there isn't much info about that.
Fawntine
Ranger and loyal follower of Tunare
